completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created in-progress bug packet for SCN-002-023 search empty-results drift. No source, test, parent artifact, or certification-owned fields modified.
Added raw vector-search confidence gating and text fallback, plus SCN-002-023 unit regressions for low-confidence, raw-before-boost, and explicit-filter behavior.
Unit and check commands passed; post-fix shared shell search E2E scripts passed, including SCN-002-023 empty-results coverage.

Validated BUG-002-003 closure from existing report evidence: post-fix SCN-002-023 passed in shared shell search E2E, known-query search remained green, and the c6d2b26 baseline was full E2E green before final packet closure.
Audited bug packet consistency: bug.md, scopes.md, uservalidation.md, report.md, and state.json now agree on Fixed/Verified/Closed status with edits confined to the BUG-002-003 packet.

executionHistory.summary: Packetized uncovered broad E2E blocker for the spec 002 search empty-results scenario.

Implemented vector confidence gating and verified unit/check/search E2E evidence. Post-fix test_search.sh and test_search_empty.sh both passed SCN-002-023, while broad E2E still had unrelated failures at implementation time.

Validated closure from report evidence: SCN-002-023 search empty-results E2E passed after the fix, the honest empty-results message was returned, known-query behavior remained green, and c6d2b26 had full E2E GREEN.
Audited packet closeout fields and report evidence formatting before final artifact lint. Edits remained confined to the BUG-002-003 packet.

failures.summary: test_search.sh SCN-002-023 unknown query expected 0 results, actual 5.
